title: joniris humilis
intro: Joniris humilis, also known as Sweet Woodruff or Galium odoratum, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its small white flowers and sweet vanilla-like fragrance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Joniris humilis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress, improve sleep, and boost the immune system. Joniris humilis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and well-being.
